talk_metadata.session_title: Bridging the Gap: Multilevel Strategies to Expand Access to Clinical Trials
talk_metadata.talk_title: Accrual to Clinical Trials – Ohio State University Project
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We have three specific aims which match three phases. The first is a baseline assessment of referral and accrual patterns."
Speaker said: "Only 40% of them had a trial for their disease, and of those, only 28% were eligible... 5% of the total patients were consented from these 2,000."

trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Improving referral and accrual to NCI-sponsored cancer clinical trials
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: No molecular or biomarker stratification; enrollment based solely on disease and stage without accounting for eligibility nuances
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: Specific tumor biomarkers that could match patients to targeted trials
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Stepped wedge design may be underpowered to detect modest changes in accrual rates across heterogeneous sites

key_data_gaps: No long‑term accrual or survival outcomes presented
No comparison to standard of care referral rates

crispro_opportunity.description: Lack of biomarker‑driven eligibility suggests an opportunity for CrisPRO to develop predictive matching algorithms to align patients with molecularly appropriate trials.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Only 40% of them had a trial for their disease, and of those, only 28% were eligible."
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate tumor genomic data with trial eligibility criteria to increase the proportion of patients with a matching trial.

unresolved_questions: How will the stepped‑wedge intervention be powered to detect differences across the nine counties?
What are the long‑term sustainability plans for the multilevel intervention?

talk_metadata.session_title: Bridging the Gap: Multilevel Strategies to Expand Access to Clinical Trials
talk_metadata.talk_title: ACT Wonder Squared S – Advancing Clinical Trials Working Through Outreach Navigation and Digitally Enabled Referral and Recruitment Strategies
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We had 36 community sessions that reached nearly 500 participants to date."
Speaker said: "Our TrialConnect portal had very few external physicians who actually availed themselves to the portal."

trial_dilution_risk.trial_name_or_nct: ACT Wonder Squared S multilevel intervention
trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Increase referral and enrollment of underserved patients into therapeutic trials
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Portal relied on external community physicians without mandatory integration, leading to low external uptake

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker disclosed low external physician adoption, indicating limited network effects and potential for competitors to offer more integrated referral tools.
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Broad outreach but insufficient engagement of community physicians reduces impact.

key_data_gaps: No quantitative impact on actual trial enrollment rates reported
Limited data on long‑term sustainability of digital tools

crispro_opportunity.description: Low adoption of the TrialConnect portal suggests a partnership opportunity for CrisPRO to provide a more robust, AI‑driven referral engine that integrates directly with EMR workflows.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We had very few external physicians who actually availed themselves to the TrialConnect portal."
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can supply an interoperable API that surfaces trial matches within the provider's EMR, increasing usability.

unresolved_questions: What specific barriers prevented external physicians from using the TrialConnect portal?
Will the digital tools be scaled beyond the priority zones?

talk_metadata.session_title: Bridging the Gap: Multilevel Strategies to Expand Access to Clinical Trials
talk_metadata.talk_title: Support Trial – ECCOACRN NCI NCORP Community Oncology Practice Sites Clinical Trial Referral Initiative
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We are demonstrating that it's not hard to enroll Black and Hispanic patients onto clinical trials. We now have 48 consented in the far right on Baptist..."
Speaker said: "IRB was probably the biggest challenge that delayed us, taking almost two years."

trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Improve referral and accrual of Black and Hispanic patients in community oncology sites
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Variable IRB processes across sites caused delays and inconsistent implementation
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Sample size of ~500 may limit detection of modest effect sizes across heterogeneous sites

key_data_gaps: Limited reporting of long‑term retention or outcomes

crispro_opportunity.description: Demonstrated success in enrolling minority patients highlights a gap that CrisPRO can fill by providing a scalable, AI‑driven enrollment platform to accelerate similar efforts nationwide.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We are demonstrating that it's not hard to enroll Black and Hispanic patients onto clinical trials..."
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can automate eligibility screening and outreach, reducing IRB‑related bottlenecks.

unresolved_questions: How will the program address staff turnover and sustain navigator capacity?
What metrics will be used to evaluate long‑term impact beyond consent numbers?

talk_metadata.session_title: Bridging the Gap: Multilevel Strategies to Expand Access to Clinical Trials
talk_metadata.talk_title: ME Alex – A Tailored Intervention to Build Trust and Facilitate Cancer Clinical Trials Referrals
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We created photorealistic virtual humans that can speak in plain language and sixth‑grade literacy to improve trial communication."
Speaker said: "We observed that AI‑generated voices lacked warmth and empathy, so we invested in voice clones of the actual virtual humans."

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker noted early versions suffered from lack of empathy, indicating the underlying speech synthesis model may be a weakness that competitors could improve upon.
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Reliance on virtual agents may limit uptake among patients preferring human interaction.

key_data_gaps: No efficacy data on actual trial enrollment impact
No comparative data versus standard education materials

crispro_opportunity.description: AI‑driven communication gaps (lack of empathy) identified; CrisPRO can supply a more nuanced conversational AI trained on patient‑derived empathy datasets.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "AI‑generated voices lacked warmth, it lacked empathy, it didn't match the person."
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's language model includes empathy calibration modules to improve patient trust.

unresolved_questions: Will the virtual educator platform be integrated with electronic health records for seamless referral?
How will privacy and data security be ensured for chat interactions?

talk_metadata.session_title: Bridging the Gap: Multilevel Strategies to Expand Access to Clinical Trials
talk_metadata.talk_title: Enabling a Cross‑Site Network is CUS2CT Through a Learning Collaborative Data Coordination and Evaluation
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We have established a sustainable national infrastructure for the CP2CT network, which has streamlined administrative processes."
Speaker said: "We developed a centralized REDCap platform for standardized data submission and harmonized reporting across diverse study systems."

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker highlighted reliance on REDCap; if competing networks adopt more advanced interoperable data lakes, this platform could become outdated.
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Potentially limited real‑time analytics for participating sites.

key_data_gaps: No direct outcome metrics on trial accrual presented
No evaluation of how the learning collaborative impacts site‑level performance

crispro_opportunity.description: Opportunity to integrate CrisPRO's predictive analytics into the CP2CT data coordination platform to provide real‑time trial matching recommendations.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "We have a centralized REDCap platform for standardized data submission and harmonized reporting across diverse study systems."
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can feed trial eligibility predictions into the REDCap workflow, enhancing decision support.

unresolved_questions: How will the network ensure data interoperability with external trial registries beyond REDCap?
What metrics will be used to assess the impact of the learning collaborative on actual patient enrollment?
